posts.author: chicagowork (Yolanda)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The pivot board app is efficient and helpful for quickly pulling data. Unfortunately, it is only available on Enterprise- level plans. It would be great to offer this feature on Pro plans as a standard feature or an a-la-cart/per seat pricing model.

What are you trying to achieve

Efficiency, clarity, and visibility.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @chicagowork ,

If you’re open to apps, you can test for free Smart Spreadsheet for monday. It has a pivot table functionality that helps you summarize the board data like so:

image1550×1021 116 KB

image1771×1011 89.9 KB

posts.author: chicagowork (Yolanda)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you! I will take a look.
